name: deep_dive_questions
note: No minItems/maxItems (strict mode forbids them); the prompt's 'produce 5 to 7' + 'cap at 7' is the sole enforcement. The n8n generator (n8n/build-f06-workflow.py, QUESTIONS_SCHEMA_RAW) carries an equivalent inline copy that is authoritative for the build — keep this file in sync with it.
